details.productUrlName: Uro Titan of Natures Wrath Ripple Foil

customAttributes.description:
When Uro enters the battlefield, sacrifice it unless it escaped.
Whenever Uro enters the battlefield or attacks, you gain 3 life and draw a card, then you may put a land card from your hand onto the battlefield.
Escape—GGUU, Exile five other cards from your graveyard. (You may cast this card from your graveyard for its escape cost.)
customAttributes.detailNote: This product is a Presale item with an estimated shipping date of 6/14/2024. Please keep in mind card details, including rarity and card name, may change up until release date as information is updated.
